//: Every number a designer would tune, in one file. Keys named // are comments and ignored by the engine.

creation.//: Character creation: each attribute starts at basePerAttribute; the player spends 'pool' points; no attribute may exceed maxAtCreation (before race/class bonuses).

derivation.//: Derived stat = base + attribute * per. Class 'armor' is added to defense afterwards.

checks.//: Active checks roll 1d{die} + skill vs DC. Dialogue may use numeric DCs or these names.

damage.//: damage = (power + scalingAttr*attrCoef) * elementMult * timingMult * brokenMult * parryMult * defendMult - defense*defenseCoef, ±variance, min minDamage. A perfect parry (mult 0) negates entirely.

attack.//: Timed hit: cursor sweeps sweepMs; press within ±perfectMs of center = perfect, ±goodMs = good.

parry.//: Enemy telegraphs for a random telegraphMin..MaxMs, then flashes '!'. Press within windowMs = parry (within perfectMs = perfect, negates). Pressing before the flash always fails.

break.//: Weakness hits reduce Toughness by the move's breakPower (weaknessOnly: other elements never chip it). At 0: Break — breakBonusDamage immediately, brokenTurns lost turns, brokenDamageMult on all damage taken, then Toughness recovers to full.

knowledge.//: If anyone in the party has Lore at or above this, enemy weaknesses are revealed from the first round.

exploration.//: Exploration camera. zoomLevels are ordered nearest → farthest (1 = native scale; any count works): Z steps one level out, X one level in, clamped at the ends. zoomDefaultIndex is the starting level; each change tweens over zoomTweenMs.
